campus.name: Kyonggi University Suwon Campus
campus.description: This campus map is based on Kyonggi University's official Suwon Campus guide and Kakao Maps place information. You can quickly check building locations and descriptions by selecting markers or items from the building list.
campus.sourceLabel: View Kyonggi University Suwon Campus Guide
campus.coordinateNote: Building descriptions are based on Kyonggi University's official page, and coordinates are based on places registered on Kakao Maps.

centralLibrary.name: Central Library
centralLibrary.description: One of the main study spaces near the main gate, frequently used by students for reading rooms and library resources.
centralLibrary.searchKeyword: Kyonggi University Suwon Campus Central Library
centralLibrary.kakaoPlaceName: Kyonggi University Suwon Campus Central Library

yejiHall.name: Yeji Hall (College of Humanities / College of Business)
yejiHall.summary: College of Humanities · College of Business
yejiHall.description: A key lecture building where classes for the College of Humanities and College of Business are held, easily accessible by walking straight from the main gate.
yejiHall.searchKeyword: Kyonggi University Suwon Campus Yeji Hall

eSquare.name: E-Square (Welfare Center 2)
eSquare.description: A central welfare space with student dining and convenience facilities, often used before and after classes.

lectureHall.name: General Lecture Hall
lectureHall.officialGuide: 350m straight from the main gate, then 50m to the left, or 450m via the path behind the Central Library
lectureHall.description: A central lecture building where many major classes are held, accessible from both the path behind the Central Library and the main gate route.
lectureHall.searchKeyword: Kyonggi University Suwon Campus General Lecture Hall
lectureHall.kakaoPlaceName: Kyonggi University Suwon Campus General Lecture Hall

facultyResearchHall.name: Faculty Research Hall
facultyResearchHall.officialGuide: 300m via the path behind the Central Library from the main gate
facultyResearchHall.description: A research-focused building located behind the Central Library, with faculty offices and academic activity spaces.
facultyResearchHall.searchKeyword: Kyonggi University Suwon Campus Faculty Research Hall

gwanggyoHall.name: Gwanggyo Hall (College of Natural Sciences)
gwanggyoHall.officialGuide: 450m straight from the main gate, or 550m via the path behind the Central Library
gwanggyoHall.description: A main lecture building for natural science classes, located between the General Lecture Hall and the engineering area.
gwanggyoHall.searchKeyword: Kyonggi University Suwon Campus Gwanggyo Hall

jiphyeonHall.name: Jiphyeon Hall (Engineering Hall)
jiphyeonHall.officialGuide: 500m straight from the main gate, or 500m via the path behind the Central Library
jiphyeonHall.description: A key building in the eastern academic area where engineering classes, labs, and projects are held.
jiphyeonHall.searchKeyword: Kyonggi University Suwon Campus Jiphyeon Hall
jiphyeonHall.kakaoPlaceName: Kyonggi University Suwon Campus Jiphyeon Hall Building 7

studentCenter.name: Student Center
studentCenter.officialGuide: 250m via the path behind the Central Library, or 200m left from the main gate and then 100m right
studentCenter.description: A central student life space that supports rest, convenience, and student activities.
studentCenter.searchKeyword: Kyonggi University Suwon Campus Student Center
studentCenter.kakaoPlaceName: Kyonggi University Suwon Campus Student Center

ui.mobileDescription: Quickly check building locations and descriptions on the Suwon campus.
ui.searchPlaceholder: Search by building name or purpose
ui.markerGuide: Click a marker to select a building and move the map.
ui.coordinateNotice: Real coordinates applied to reduce mismatch.
